nodes.label: Behavior tests for mangaba_cli.inventory.  Locks the invariants the three migrat

include_unconfigured=True adds CANONICAL_PROVIDERS rows that     list_authentica
If list_authenticated_providers already returned a row for a     canonical slug,
Skeleton rows (unconfigured canonical providers) must carry the     setup hint t
For api_key providers with a defined env var, the warning must     point to that
Section 3 of list_authenticated_providers sets is_user_defined=True     for cano

Full pipeline: real load_picker_context + real     list_authenticated_providers.
